tools.name: discover_capabilities
tools.description: List everything the LedgerProof Autonomous Network (LAIN) sells: capability ids, input schemas, pricing, environments (test/live), and the settlement rule (payment captures only against a cryptographically anchored proof).

tools.name: request_capability
tools.description: Buy a capability — LIVE, real money, by default. Provide capability id (e.g. receipt.agent-run: pass action plus at least one of inputs_hash/outputs_hash/state_hash, 64-hex sha256) and optional objective/budget. The response returns an anchored proof immediately plus a Stripe checkout URL; pay it an

tools.name: get_job
tools.description: Poll a job by id. For paid checkout jobs this is also the settlement trigger: once the buyer has paid, polling captures the charge strictly against the anchored proof and returns the deliverable.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "request_capability" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
